cmd_commands.name: DIR
cmd_commands.description: Display a list of files and folders.

cmd_commands.name: COPY
cmd_commands.description: Copy one or more files to another location.

cmd_commands.name: MOVE
cmd_commands.description: Move files from one folder to another.

cmd_commands.name: ECHO
cmd_commands.description: Display a message on the screen.

cmd_commands.name: PAUSE
cmd_commands.description: Pause the execution of a batch file and display a message.

cmd_commands.name: EXIT
cmd_commands.description: Quit the command prompt or a batch file.

cmd_commands.name: TRACERT
cmd_commands.description: Trace route to a remote host.

cmd_commands.name: VOL
cmd_commands.description: Display the disk volume label and serial number.

cmd_commands.name: SHUTDOWN
cmd_commands.description: Shut down or restart the computer.

cmd_commands.name: FC
cmd_commands.description: Compare two files and display differences.

cmd_commands.name: TITLE
cmd_commands.description: Set the title for the command prompt window.

cmd_commands.name: FIND
cmd_commands.description: Search for a text string in a file.

cmd_commands.name: TIME
cmd_commands.description: Display or set the system time.

cmd_commands.name: DATE
cmd_commands.description: Display or set the system date.

cmd_commands.name: PATH
cmd_commands.description: Display or set a search path for executable files.
